query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A scene with turquoise horizontal and vertical structural elements suggestive of a bridge railing or pier framework, accompanied by dark vertical supports below, thin green and gold strands on the right edge, and a bright pale background occupying the upper portion.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An intentionally blurred, abstract photograph in which a turquoise bridge or pier structure and nearby vegetation are rendered as vertical streaks and smeared bands of color. The extreme motion-like softening dissolves architectural details into flowing blue, brown, and gold tones against a bright background, abandoning recognizable subject matter in favor of texture and formal color composition.
